channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Unwanted Furniture Dumped on Pavement, 14th May
item.description:
A large(ish) item of unwanted furniture has been left dumped on the pavement outside number 139. Can the local team please remove it. Thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Griffin Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Unwanted Sofa Dumped on Pavement, 13th May
item.description:
An unwanted sofa has been left dumped on the pavement outside number 114. Can the local team please remove it. Thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Brewery Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large Unwanted Fridge-Freezer Dumped on Pavement, 13th May
item.description:
A large unwanted fridge-freezer has been left dumped on the pavement outside number 116. Can the local team please remove it. Thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Brewery Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken Fridge Trays Dumped on Pavement, 13th May
item.description:
Several broken fridge trays have been left dumped on the pavement outside number 67 / 69. Can the local team please remove them. Thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Griffin Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Unwanted Carpet and Bags of Rubbish Dumped on Pavement, 13th May
item.description:
A length of unwanted carpet and bags of rubbish have been left dumped on the pavement outside number 43. Can the local team please clear them away. Thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Griffin Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Unwanted Suitcase Dumped on Pavement, 13th May
item.description:
An unwanted suitcase has been left dumped on the pavement outside number 25. Can the local team please remove it. Thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Griffin Road, Plumstead

item.title: Broken Table Dumped on Pavement, 13th May
item.description:
A broken table has been left dumped on the pavement outside number 15. Can the local team please remove it. Thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Griffin Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Access Panel from Lamppost Removed Exposing Electrical Components, 13th May
item.description:
The access panel for the lamppost has been removed, exposing the electrical components. Can it please be fixed. Thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Southport Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large Box of Rubbish Dumped on Path, 13th May
item.description:
A large box of rubbish has been left dumped on the path. Can the local team please remove it. Thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Elmley Street, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large Amount of Rubbish Dumped on Turfed Area, 13th May
item.description:
A large amount of rubbish has been left dumped on the turfed area. Can the local team please clear it away. Thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Elmley Street, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken Furniture and Bags of Rubbish Dumped on Path, 13th May
item.description:
Broken furniture and bags of rubbish have been left dumped on the path. Can the local team please remove them. Thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Robert Street, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overcrowded Zebra crossing, 13th May
item.description:
The zebra crossing here is unsuitable for the current foot traffic levels - drivers are often stuck for minutes at a time without a gap, sometimes feeling the need to drive onto the crossing while pedestrians are still crossing in order to make progress - especially around 9am on weekdays. A pelican crossing would be much more suitable.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 21-24, Chiswell Street, Finsbury, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Doesn't really look like its sorted?, 13th May
item.description:
Absolute shambles - please clean up?

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Howard Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned untaxed and no parking permit, 13th May
item.description:
White Tipper truck on Mauritius Road SE10. Think abandoned as has a flat tyre. Rubbish/waste (not sure if safe) in the back (not secured or covered) blowing round. Duration 2 months.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Mauritius Road, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned bike on Cowper Street, 13th May
item.description:
Abandoned bike that hasn’t been touched in a while opposite 28 Cowper Street

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 32-37, Cowper Street, Finsbury, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside 199 (I think but could be 201), 13th May
item.description:
Mattress
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Willesden Lane, Kilburn, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Medium - Up to medium size van load

item.title: Faded double yellow lines on the corner of Glendale Mews with Westgate Road, 13th May
item.description:
Double yellow lines faded such that they are ignored.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Glendale Mews, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street light not working, 13th May
item.description:
Street light not working in a very dark, bushy area with poor pavement likely to cause a fall or be dangerous
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Appledore Crescent, Longlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street lights not on full power/dim, 13th May
item.description:
Lighting on Palace View between the junction with Murray Av and Rafford Way toward the Rafford Way end, not working properly. 3 of them are very dim, as if on reduced power, and with the overhanging large trees, the area is very dark at night.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Palace View, Widmore, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping, 13th May
item.description:
2 double mattresses dumped on busy pavement

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Bramhope Lane, Charlton
Report on FixMyStreet
